payout_recommendation.rationale: Detailed adversarial steelman with concrete evidence links and a viable 4-point patch proposal. High technical depth.

rankings.justification: Strongest claim: structured YAML with Sybil-risk analysis, TVL critique, extraction tokenomics, and four concrete patch proposals linking repo artifacts.

payout_recommendation.rationale: Meta-survey ranks 5 claims with fraud-risk tiers, payout differentiation, and technical depth scoring. Good methodology.

rankings.justification: Solid analytical work: provides ranked table with fraud-risk labels and distinct payout recommendations, demonstrating rigorous comparative judgment.

payout_recommendation.rationale: Contains a link to an actual PR review on BoTTube repo with 4+ specific technical observations.

rankings.justification: Higher substance than generic PR reviews: references real review URL and lists specific issues (README replacement risk, node-url conflict, Dockerfile absence).

payout_recommendation.rationale: Standard PR review claim with proof link but low detail in the issue body itself.

rankings.justification: Acceptable but thin: only a generic summary in the issue body; proof exists externally, requiring verifier to click through.

payout_recommendation.rationale: Minimal content (single haiku + hardware tag). Genuine but lowest effort-per-RTC ratio among the 5.

rankings.justification: Lowest depth: 5-7-5 haiku is valid but provides no additional evidence or technical context beyond the minimum requirement.
